creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-05-31 12:59:01 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-themes           Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11-themes/gtk-nodoka-engine Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                 pkg-plist 
    x11-themes/gtk-nodoka-engine/files patch-src_Makefile.in 
  Log:
  Nodoka is the new Fedora default theme for Gnome. This port install the engine
  and GTK themes.
  
  WWW:    https://fedorahosted.org/nodoka/
  
  PR:             ports/131041
  Submitted by:   Romain Tartiere <romain at blogreen.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.226     +1 -0      ports/x11-themes/Makefile
  1.1       +37 -0     ports/x11-themes/gtk-nodoka-engine/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11-themes/gtk-nodoka-engine/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +36 -0     ports/x11-themes/gtk-nodoka-engine/files/patch-src_Makefile.in (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/x11-themes/gtk-nodoka-engine/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/x11-themes/gtk-nodoka-engine/pkg-plist (new)
